delivery.rationale: Organizer validation is required to close the walking skeleton for event attendance.

nodes.title: Define attendance idempotency and audit persistence
acceptanceChecks: One check-in per attendee per event is explicitly protected.

nodes.title: Define organizer permission validation
acceptanceChecks: Organizer permission is checked server-side for validation.

nodes.title: Define QR token validation service contract
writeScope: future application validation service contract documentation
acceptanceChecks: All validation outcomes map to specification result states.

nodes.title: Define check-in session query and validation mutation
acceptanceChecks: API responses support UI states without unsafe data exposure.

nodes.title: Define organizer scanner UI states
writeScope: future application organizer scanner UI documentation
acceptanceChecks: Every design state is represented in the UI state model.

nodes.title: Define analytics and observability instrumentation
writeScope: future application analytics and logging documentation
acceptanceChecks: Validation attempts and failure reasons are measurable.

nodes.title: Define validation test coverage
acceptanceChecks: Tests cover behavior, security, UX, analytics, and accessibility.
